items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where an individual cancels within a group booking. However, the evidence does not provide any specific outcomes or behaviors related to this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the system supports such cancellations. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address this specific scenario, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the expected result.
